areas.title: Medical Image Analysis
areas.description: Chest X-ray classification, polyp detection, breast cancer diagnosis using deep learning.

areas.title: Semi-Supervised Learning
areas.description: Self-supervised frameworks, SSL for imbalanced medical data, contrastive learning.

areas.title: Precision Agriculture
areas.description: CNN-based weed detection, plant classification, automated agricultural management.

areas.title: NLP & Bengali Text
areas.description: Depression detection, transformer models (BanglaBERT), mental health AI.

projects.title: Medical Image Enhancement Tool
projects.description: Web-based medical image enhancement tool using Streamlit, OpenCV, and NumPy. Implements contrast adjustment, gamma correction, segmentation, filtering, and PSNR/SSIM evaluation with real-time visualization and download.

projects.title: Cerebral Stroke Prediction using Machine Learning
projects.description: Predicted stroke risks using six ML models on a 43,400-instance dataset, achieving up to 98% accuracy. Demonstrates ML potential in early healthcare intervention.

projects.title: Automatic Plant Seedlings Classification Using Deep Learning
projects.description: Custom CNN with advanced preprocessing and hyperparameter tuning, achieving 99% accuracy in classifying diverse plant species for agricultural applications.

projects.title: DIU Bus Management System
projects.description: Platform for real-time bus tracking, ticket booking, and notifications for Daffodil International University using modern web technologies.

thesis.title: A Hybrid Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Chest X-Ray Classification Using Self-Supervised Learning
thesis.supervisorTitle: Associate Professor & Lab Director, Dept. of CSE
thesis.description: Hybrid deep learning framework using self-supervised pre-training, advanced encoders, LSTM, and attention mechanisms to classify pulmonary diseases from chest X-rays — achieving 95.99% accuracy and outperforming existing methods on imbalanced data.
